description: Code filters specify additional constraints on the data, specifying the value set of interest for a particular element of the data.
The codes for the code filter.
The Codeable Concepts for the code filter.
The Coding for the code filter.
Date filters specify additional constraints on the data in terms of the applicable date range for specific elements.
Indicates that specific elements of the type are referenced by the knowledge module and must be supported by the consumer in order to obtain an effective evaluation.
If specified, this indicates a profile that the input data must conform to, or that the output data will conform to.
